style_name: Pop Bubble Letter Photo Poster Style
summary: A punchy photo-and-illustration poster style built around a central low-angle fashion portrait framed by oversized flat bubble-letter shapes, saturated candy colors, thick black outlines, oval highlights, and crisp sparkle marks.
prompt_template:
Create an image in pop-bubble-letter-photo-poster-style.

Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, interacting with or carrying {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, in {LOCATION}. Style the subject with {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Use real photographic portrait detail for the subject: low-angle editorial framing, bright direct sunlight or clean studio light, crisp skin and fabric texture, saturated wardrobe, calm confident expression.

Layout: center the subject on the vertical axis and surround them with {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Build the poster from oversized flat bubble-letter forms spelling or suggesting "{MAIN_TEXT}". Crop the letters hard against the frame edges. Layer some letter shapes behind the subject and some in the foreground over the lower frame while keeping the face and main gesture unobstructed.

Graphic language: thick black outlines, smooth flat fills, hot pink, candy yellow, leaf green, tangerine orange, tomato red, powder blue, deep evergreen negative space, cream-white oval shine highlights, and {ACCENT_SYMBOL}. Keep the bubbles bold, rounded, inflated, vector-like, and pop-art.

Text: use "{MAIN_TEXT}" as the large bubble-letter graphic word. Add "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" only as tiny editorial caption text if needed. Do not include watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, QR codes, platform logos, or app marks.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, app interface marks, copied reference person, copied outfit, copied exact text, long paragraphs, crowded small text, 3D balloon letters, chrome typography, glossy plastic render, clay mascot, muted pastel-only palette, thin-line doodles, busy street background, horror, dystopian, grunge, cyberpunk, luxury minimalist editorial

variables.SUBJECT: main person, model, performer, maker, athlete, student, traveler, or product ambassador
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: standing still, leaning back, looking upward, closing eyes in sunlight, holding a prop, stepping forward, or posing calmly
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: camera, headphones, drink bottle, book, bouquet, transit card, compact mirror, sunglasses, or featured product
variables.LOCATION: painted wall, studio set, public plaza, gallery exterior, market stall, campus courtyard, subway entrance, or clean event backdrop
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: dark green negative-space panel, oversized cropped bubble letters, white sparkle marks, oval shine highlights, candy-colored abstract shapes
variables.MAIN_TEXT: short bubble-letter word or graphic headline such as WOW, POP, OPEN, BLOOM, WAVE, or PLAY
variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: tiny editorial caption, campaign note, date line, or short supporting phrase
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: four-point sparkle, oval highlight, curved underline, star separator, or small rounded sticker shape
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: bold striped knit, saturated trousers, color-block streetwear, mod fashion layers, clean editorial styling, or retro pop styling

variables.SUBJECT: a young gallery host
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: standing calmly with chin lifted toward sunlight
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: deep evergreen negative-space panel, huge cropped hot-pink and candy-yellow bubble letters, white sparkle marks, oval shine highlights
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: red-and-cream striped mockneck, golden trousers, and clean mod styling

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a horizontal 16:9 image in pop-bubble-letter-photo-poster-style. Scene: a young gallery host standing calmly with chin lifted toward sunlight, holding a compact silver camera, against a painted outdoor gallery wall. Style the subject with a red-and-cream striped mockneck, golden trousers, and clean mod styling. Use real photographic portrait detail, low-angle editorial framing, bright direct sun, crisp skin and fabric texture, and a calm confident expression. Place the subject slightly off-center but dominant, with a deep evergreen negative-space field around the face and torso. Stretch huge cropped hot-pink, candy-yellow, leaf-green, and powder-blue bubble letters spelling "OPEN" across the full width. Layer some letter forms behind the subject and some across the lower foreground. Add white four-point sparkle separators and cream oval shine highlights. Add tiny caption text "gallery noon / color wall" only if it stays clean and unobtrusive. No watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, or app mark.
example_cases.prompt_9x16: Create a vertical 9:16 image in pop-bubble-letter-photo-poster-style. Scene: a young gallery host standing calmly with chin lifted toward sunlight, holding a compact silver camera, against a painted outdoor gallery wall. Style the subject with a red-and-cream striped mockneck, golden trousers, and clean mod styling. Use real photographic portrait detail, low-angle editorial framing, bright direct sun, crisp skin and fabric texture, and a calm confident expression. Center the subject from waist to head, face in the upper-middle, surrounded by a deep evergreen negative-space panel, huge cropped hot-pink and candy-yellow bubble letters spelling "OPEN", white sparkle marks, and oval shine highlights. Layer some bubble shapes behind the subject and some over the lower foreground while keeping the face and camera unobstructed. Thick black outlines, smooth flat fills, hot pink, candy yellow, leaf green, tangerine orange, tomato red, powder blue, cream-white oval highlights. Add tiny caption text "gallery noon / color wall" only if it stays clean and unobtrusive. No watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, or app mark.

variables.SUBJECT: a campus radio DJ

variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: cream oval highlights and small star separators
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: lime cardigan, white tee, red skirt or trousers, and playful retro accessories

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a horizontal 16:9 image in pop-bubble-letter-photo-poster-style. Scene: a campus radio DJ leaning back with eyes closed while listening, holding yellow headphones and a tiny recorder, in a sunny campus courtyard stage wall. Style the subject with a lime cardigan, white tee, red skirt or trousers, and playful retro accessories. Use a real photographic subject with low-angle editorial framing, warm direct sunlight, and saturated wardrobe detail. Place the subject near center, framed by a dark green central field and wide cropped orange, powder-blue, hot-pink, and candy-yellow bubble letters spelling "BOP" across the full banner. Add thick black outlines, cream oval highlights, and white star separators. Keep the face and headphones clear while foreground bubbles overlap the lower edge. Add tiny caption text "campus set / lunch break mix" only as clean microcopy. No watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, or app mark.
example_cases.prompt_9x16: Create a vertical 9:16 image in pop-bubble-letter-photo-poster-style. Scene: a campus radio DJ leaning back with eyes closed while listening, holding yellow headphones and a tiny recorder, in a sunny campus courtyard stage wall. Style the subject with a lime cardigan, white tee, red skirt or trousers, and playful retro accessories. Use a real photographic subject with low-angle editorial framing, warm direct sunlight, and saturated wardrobe detail. Center the subject on the vertical axis and surround them with a dark green central field, cropped orange and powder-blue bubble letters spelling "BOP", hot-pink side shapes, oval highlights, and white star separators. Use thick black outlines, smooth flat fills, candy yellow, hot pink, leaf green, tangerine orange, tomato red, and powder blue. Let large foreground bubble shapes cover only the lower frame, not the face or headphones. Add tiny caption text "campus set / lunch break mix" only as clean microcopy. No watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, or app mark.

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a horizontal 16:9 image in pop-bubble-letter-photo-poster-style. example_cases.prompt_9x16: Create a vertical 9:16 image in pop-bubble-letter-photo-poster-style. Center the subject, then surround them with deep green negative space, huge yellow and pink bubble forms spelling "BLOOM", cropped leaf-green letter shapes, white sparkle marks, cream oval highlights, rounded sticker dots, and thick black outlines. variables.SUBJECT: a city commuter
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: stepping forward and lifting a transit card toward the sun
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a bright transit card and tote bag
variables.LOCATION: a graphic subway entrance campaign wall
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: dark green center panel, oversized powder-blue wave letters, yellow cropped corner bubbles, hot-pink side field, orange edge shapes, white sparkles
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: orange ribbed top, cobalt trousers, white tote, and clean urban pop styling

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a horizontal 16:9 image in pop-bubble-letter-photo-poster-style. Scene: a city commuter stepping forward and lifting a transit card toward the sun, carrying a bright transit card and tote bag, in front of a graphic subway entrance campaign wall. Style the subject with an orange ribbed top, cobalt trousers, white tote, and clean urban pop styling. Use real photographic portrait detail, low-angle editorial framing, direct sunlight, and saturated fabric texture. Place the subject slightly left of center with a dark green field behind the face and torso. Stretch oversized powder-blue wave letters spelling "WAVE" across the lower and right frame, with yellow cropped corner bubbles, hot-pink side fields, orange edge shapes, white sparkles, cream oval highlights, and thick black outlines. Add tiny caption text "next stop / color route" only as clean microcopy. No watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, or app mark.
example_cases.prompt_9x16: Create a vertical 9:16 image in pop-bubble-letter-photo-poster-style. Scene: a city commuter stepping forward and lifting a transit card toward the sun, carrying a bright transit card and tote bag, in front of a graphic subway entrance campaign wall. Style the subject with an orange ribbed top, cobalt trousers, white tote, and clean urban pop styling. Use real photographic portrait detail, low-angle editorial framing, direct sunlight, and saturated fabric texture. Center the subject from waist to head. Build a dense frame from a dark green center panel, oversized powder-blue wave letters spelling "WAVE", yellow cropped corner bubbles, hot-pink side field, orange edge shapes, white sparkles, cream oval highlights, and thick black outlines. Layer some bubble forms over the lower frame while preserving the face, raised card, and tote silhouette. Add tiny caption text "next stop / color route" only as clean microcopy. No watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, or app mark.
